title: Evidence API Cost Spike
subtitle: Serving identical evidence reads drives compute costs up
objective: Restructure read path to maximize cache/CDN hit rate and reduce API burden.

concepts.title: Read Path Caching
concepts.description: Use CDN or cache to reduce API round-trips.

concepts.title: API as Gatekeeper
concepts.description: Persistent data access should stay behind API.

concepts.title: Ingress Stability
concepts.description: Use load balancer to protect API from spikes.
